archetype: Automated Grain Silo Fumigation and Pest Control Management System
description: This system monitors and controls grain silo fumigation and pest control processes to prevent spoilage and ensure food safety. It is used by grain storage facility operators to optimize fumigation schedules and reduce chemical usage. The system integrates with sensors and machinery to automate fumigation and monitoring processes, while ensuring compliance with regulations such as the US Environmental Protection Agency's (EPA) Fumigation Rule.
rules: MUST integrate with industry-standard grain silo sensors (e.g. temperature, humidity, CO2) to monitor grain conditions
MUST support multiple fumigation protocols (e.g. phosphine, methyl bromide) and adapt to changing regulatory requirements
MUST implement predictive analytics to optimize fumigation schedules based on historical data and real-time sensor readings
MUST provide real-time alerts and notifications to facility operators and regulatory agencies in case of anomalies or non-compliance
MUST ensure secure data storage and transmission to comply with FDA's Food Safety Modernization Act (FSMA)
anti_patterns: DO NOT use a generic, off-the-shelf SCADA system without modifications for grain silo fumigation
DO NOT neglect to account for regional and seasonal variations in pest populations and grain conditions
DO NOT fail to implement data-driven decision support for fumigation scheduling and chemical usage optimization
key_technical_challenges: Integrating with diverse sensor hardware and firmware from multiple manufacturers
Developing predictive models that account for complex interactions between grain conditions, pest populations, and fumigation protocols
Ensuring real-time data processing and alerting in a resource-constrained, remote environment

recommended_stack.language: Python + extensive libraries for data science and IoT integration
recommended_stack.framework: Flask + flexible API design for sensor and machinery integration
recommended_stack.database_engine: PostgreSQL + robust support for time-series data and spatial queries
recommended_stack.cache: Redis + fast data access for real-time processing
recommended_stack.message_broker: Apache Kafka + scalable and fault-tolerant message handling
